org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange

接口 ExchangeClient

  • 所有超级接口:
    Channel, Client, Endpoint, ExchangeChannel, IdleSensible, Resetable
    所有已知实现类:
    HeaderExchangeClient

    public interface ExchangeClient
extends Client, ExchangeChannel
    ExchangeClient. (API/SPI, Prototype, ThreadSafe)
